svg.text: Gamble Battle — Phase 1 Trait Reference Atlas
NON-PRODUCTION REVIEW DIAGRAM • palette / form / surface / motion / supernatural cost
No unit concepts, trait icons, shop cards, portraits, sprites, animation sheets, or VFX assets.
salt efflorescence crossed by stained-glass stress lines
successive planes folding toward an impact
tensioned verticals interrupted like edited sentences
marks writing inward, burning away, then repeating
lost speech and anatomy reorganized as notation
inward-folded weight and failed upward growth
dirty wax, cracked gilding and bruised scar tissue
reluctant light transferring wounds toward its source
shame posture and fresh evidence of borrowed pain
compressed blocks with almost no loose negative space
quilted density crossed by old pressure scars
long stillness followed by one snapped release
locked joints, flattened breath and reopened bands
repaired luxury carrying multiple ownership scars
pressure and advantage passing through a closed network
one body split between prior and transformed states
heat bloom crossing ceramic, slag and tissue
a reaction front traveling from one contact point
one contour repeated at unequal intervals
faded layers aging at different rates
early afterimage, delayed impact, brief reverse dust
unequal age and memories out of sequence
top weight collapsing into one downward line
broad iron, bone and dried termination marks
compression followed by an abrupt final stop
stiffened procedure and victim traces that remain
a continuous body interrupted by deliberate absence
incompatible repairs with erased identity patches
drifting parts that align only at exact moments
names, features and belonging worn away
terraced load paths settling into a broad base
masonry bonds and layered field repairs
impact traveling downward and dispersing through strata
the individual buried beneath accumulated structure
paired rhythms producing interference instead of decoration
breath and shadow locking to an exact count
private emotion forced into public synchronization
flared contours occupying several false positions
weathered moiré and smoky chromatic misregistration
local afterimages breathing out of phase
fractured vision and unstable bodily registration
cross-body lines reaching toward an absent counterpart
unlike materials joined by unequal living seams
consequence traveling the shortest relational path
boundaries left porous after connection ends
one looming posture directing an incomplete echo
graded marks and scars of repeated correction
source hollowing as imposed identity spreads
central weight expanding beyond personal space
worn luxury compressed into dense storage strata
survival making nearby matter heavier and darker
flesh replaced by collateral and owned value
branching tension interrupted by failed joints
burned insulation and copper-green discharge paths
irregular surge, complete snap, sudden dead drop
tremor, sensory loss and muscles fighting joints
starved mass pulling inward around a predatory center
dried oxblood, clot marbling and borrowed veins
vitality drawn inward and packed beneath the skin
borrowed memories and cycles of emptiness and overfill
one overworked side shaped around storage and retrieval
burned indexing, absorbed ink and memory scars
information compressing before one deliberate pulse
the archive preserving facts while erasing its owner
forward-loaded mass with an asymmetric recoil line
old impacts aligned into functional scar patterns
each hit tightening the next committed vector
deformed joints and collapse when momentum stops
immense overhangs carrying visible accumulated strata
clay, burial layers and traces of former lives
new mass settling after each exertion
selfhood buried until the body becomes a place
asymmetric layers able to pivot into several routes
possibilities fanning, swapping and hardening into one
origin erased by too many successful exchanges
one narrowed diagonal committing the whole body
layers scored, struck through and progressively erased
each contact carving closer to an exposed core
the accuser corroded into one permanent grievance
